scene: A cartoon bat hanging upside down wearing tiny dark sunglasses and holding a little white cane, playing into the blind assumption. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A cheerful cartoon bat with big bright wide-open eyes, sunglasses tossed aside, seeing clearly. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A cartoon bat looking at a glowing ultraviolet flower with shimmering purple patterns that only the bat can see. Flat deep purple background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A cartoon bat flying in the dark sending out little sound-wave arcs from its mouth that bounce off obstacles and map the cave. Flat dark navy background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A cartoon bat with both big open eyes AND sound-wave arcs at the same time, using both senses together. Flat dusty blue background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A big chubby fruit bat with huge adorable eyes calmly looking around at a piece of fruit, no sound waves. Flat warm green background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A confident cartoon bat with sharp eyes glancing smugly at a doodle stick figure who is squinting and struggling to see. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
